===[[Pokémon Masters EX]]===
Drayden is mentioned in one of {{mas|Iris}}'s [[Sync pair story|sync pair stories]] as the person who {{pkmn2|gift}}ed her with the {{p|Deino}} that is now her {{p|Hydreigon}}. He made his debut as an NPC during the [[story event]] [[League Club Problem Child]].
